ci_commands_discovered: bun lint (via npx oxlint src/js) - JavaScript/TypeScript linting
bun run zig:check - requires zig compiler (not in container)
bun run banned - requires bun runtime (not in container)
bun run typecheck - requires tsc, bun (not in container)
p2p_tests_added: test_repo_oxlint_js - Mirrors bun lint CI check using npx oxlint
test_repo_no_banned_patterns - Check for banned patterns near fix site
p2p_enrichment.notes: Added npx oxlint as a working CI-derived p2p gate. Container lacks bun/zig toolchains for other CI commands. Using Python static analysis for remaining p2p gates.

validate.notes: All validation checks passed. Fixed: (1) judge.py logic - moved rules check before API key check so empty rubric returns 1.0, (2) eval_manifest.yaml - removed irrelevant memory management rubric rule that didn't apply to this control-flow-only fix (no allocations, no defer needed).
